description: Read-only FiveDim Lite card schema. Phase A is a data availability skeleton, not an independent model.

dimension_contract.market_view: Wraps existing w1_candidate_builder output; all candidate items inherit basis=market_implied_score_matrix, independent_edge=false, calibrated=false.
dimension_contract.strength_view: Local strength facts only. Missing ELO/FIFA/ranking/history must stay missing.
dimension_contract.tactical_view: Local lineup/tactical context only. No current-match post-match statistics.
dimension_contract.chemistry_view: Local squad/lineup availability only. No fabricated player chemistry.
dimension_contract.environment_view: Local venue/weather/static context only. Missing runtime context stays missing or degraded.

hard_rules: Phase A is read-only and offline only.
Every dimension and leaf must keep independent_edge=false.
No external fetch or network import.
No betting, stake, money, hit-rate, or opportunity wording.
No current-match post-match-only field may appear in pre-match view fields.
Do not modify w1_score_engine.py, DEFAULT_RHO, build lambda/matrix logic, decision_policy, odds thresholds, dashboard, or result ledger.
